The '''Knytix''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] mantid from [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] that the [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] employed in a number of capacities. They were said to make excellent pets and [[Soup/Legends|soup]], and their saliva was used in the construction of Vratix buildings. [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] found this an odd custom on her visit to a [[Verachen]] village, but accepted it as one of the very many cultures of the diverse [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].

{{Creature-stub}}
